name: sec-review
description: Cybersecurity review plugin for web services and servers: a pipelined five-agent architecture (sec-expert, finding-triager, cve-enricher, sast-runner, report-writer) with model pinning — sonnet-grade code reasoning, haiku-grade CVE feed I/O and SAST tool dispatch. Citation-grounded expertise across databases, frameworks, webservers (including Windows/IIS as of v0.4.0), proxies, frontend, auth, TLS, containers, secrets, and supply-chain; live CVE enrichment from NVD 2.0, OSV.dev, and GHSA with CISA KEV cross-reference for exploit-in-wild prioritization; SAST adapter invoking semgrep (OWASP Top Ten) and bandit with origin-tagged findings and an unavailable-tool sentinel; per-run token-cost accounting; offline-degradation drills for both CVE feeds and SAST tools; prioritized markdown report with reliable, primary-source-cited fixes.
